issues: V4 found MORE latin tokens (7) than Schmeh hints (2)

glyphs.vision_description: Spitzer, nach links offener Bracket-Winkel (umgekehrtes L), wie ein auf den Kopf gestelltes Eckzeichen
Spitze nach rechts geöffnete Klammer / chevronartiges Zeichen
Kreis mit Zahl 73, links in der Zeile, vollständig sichtbar

graphics.description: Geschwungene Verbindungslinien zwischen den Zahlenkreisen, bilden das Netz eines magischen Würfels
Kreisförmige Umrandungen um jede Zahl (15+ sichtbare Kreise)

glyphs.vision_description: Partial arc visible at the top-left corner of the line, indicating the bottom of another circle from the row above.

graphics.description: Short straight line segments connecting the main circles horizontally near their top arcs (between the two visible circles and from circle to image edges).
Multiple partial circle arcs at the top edge of the line, indicating this row belongs to a larger 3x3 interconnected circle grid (magic cube structure).

glyphs.vision_description: Circular node containing '80', top-center, partially clipped at top edge

graphics.description: Straight line connecting node 45 (left) to a smaller partial circle near top
Straight line connecting node 80 down toward node 79
Straight line connecting node 82 down toward node 78
Straight line connecting node 77 up to node 82 area
Long diagonal line connecting node 77 area to node 48 on the far right
Diagonal line from upper region down toward node 48
Several small partial circles clipped at bottom edge (4-5), appearing as a row beneath the main graph
Connected graph/network of numbered circular nodes joined by curved arcs, possibly representing a relationship or sequence diagram
Long sweeping curve passing through upper region from left cluster to node 74
Curve from 50 to 55 and continuing right

glyphs.vision_description: Y/K-förmiges Glyph mit diagonalem Arm und Vertikalstrich
Winkel-Glyph ähnlich der Ziffer 4 mit Spitze nach unten
Offene nach links gewölbte Form ähnlich einem gespiegelten 'c' oder 'e' ohne Querstrich.

regions.description: Schmeh 2017 vollständige lateinische Sätze (4 lines, joined)

latin_tokens.text: "NOW THE WEIGHT OF GOLD THAT CAME TO SOLOMON IN ONE YEAR WAS SIX HUNDRED THREESCORE AND SIX TALENTS OF GOLD"
